heading: Industrial insulation and audit guidelines
label: 6350 Industrial insulation and audit guidelines
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Energy Policy Act of 1992, and not as part of the Energy Policy and Conservation Act which comprises this chapter.

Amendments1998—Subsec. (c). struck out heading and text of subsec. (c). Text read as follows: “Not later than 2 years after , and biennially thereafter, as part of the report required under , the Secretary shall report to the Congress on activities conducted pursuant to this section, including—Pub. L. 105–362section 6349(d) of this titleOctober 24, 1995“(1) a review of the status of industrial energy auditing procedures; and“(2) an evaluation of the effectiveness of the guidelines established under subsection (a) of this section and the responsiveness of the industrial sector to such guidelines.”1995—Subsec. (c). in introductory provisions substituted “1995” for “1992”, and inserted “as part of the report required under ,” after “and biennially thereafter,”.Pub. L. 104–66section 6349(d) of this title

children.heading: Voluntary guidelines for energy efficiency auditing and insulating
children.label: a Voluntary guidelines for energy efficiency auditing and insulating

children.text: the conduct of energy efficiency audits of industrial facilities to identify cost-effective opportunities to increase energy efficiency; and
the installation of insulation to achieve cost-effective increases in energy efficiency in industrial facilities.

children.heading: Educational and technical assistance
children.label: b Educational and technical assistance
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct a program of educational and technical assistance to promote the use of the voluntary guidelines established under subsection (a).
